item.title: 数据中心机架市场随着人工智能基础设施的扩展而加速 |到 2033 年将达到 135 亿美元 |持久性市场研究
item.summary: LONDON, July 14, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The global data center rack market is growing rapidly, expected to be valued at around US$ 7.5 billion in 2026 and projected to reach US$ 13.5 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 8.8% during the forecast period. This expansion is being driven by unprecedented investments in hyperscale
